name: Pizza
recipeIngredient: 1 large prepared pizza crust (or substitute favorite crust)
1 14-ounce can beans (S&W Pinquinto beans or similar)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine the pasta sauce and beans. Stir to mix. Add spices to taste.
2. Sauté the onion and mushrooms in your favorite method until nearly done. Add dried tomatoes 30 seconds before finishing.
3. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
4. Spread the sautéed onions, mushrooms, and dried tomatoes onto the pizza crust.
5. Pour the sauce/beans over the toppings and spread to cover.
6. Sprinkle nutritional yeast evenly over the sauce.
7. Bake for 11 minutes in the preheated oven. If using a prebaked crust, the bake time will be shorter.
8. Serve.
